turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, main receipt maangna chahta hoon apne treatment ki. Mujhe income tax ke liye chahiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul, main help kar sakta hoon. Aapka naam aur registered mobile number bataiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Joshi, main aapka record dekh raha hoon. Aapne is financial year mein total ₹31,400 ki services li hain. Consolidated receipt chahiye ya itemized?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Itemized better hogi, income tax ke liye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai. Main aapki registered email par itemized receipt bhej deta hoon — aath se dus minute mein aa jaayegi. Kya email sahi hai jo record mein hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. Agar receipt 15 minute mein na aaye toh dobara call karein. Koi aur help?
